long_description:
NRE were alerted of link flaps between bbr02.eq01.sng02 xe-10/0/9 <-> TL TL. Raising this INC to track progress.


https://github.ibm.com/IaaS-NRE/nreincidents/issues/19926
short_description: bbr02.eq01.sng02 xe-10/0/9, ae12, xe-2/1/3 | Transit Peering Link Flap
